reviews.comment:
El lugar muy agradable. Las señoras muy amables. Precios elevados. El parador muy abandonado, sucio, pasto largo y mesas sin mantenimiento. Una lástima.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice. The staff is very friendly. The prices are high. The restaurant is very neglected, dirty, with long grass and unmaintained tables. A shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdnJiYmVREAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños estaban en muy mal estado, sucios y con mal olor. A favor tienen dispenser de agua caliente gratuitos, y un hermoso lugar arbolado para parar con mesitas, pero deberían mejorar la limpieza

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were in very poor condition, dirty and smelly. On the plus side, they have free hot water dispensers and a lovely wooded area with tables for relaxing, but they really need to improve the cleanliness.
